item.title: QuestBits 1.2.2
item.description:
## [1.2.2] - 2026-07-09
### Added
- Dev/prod build flavors: local builds now produce an isolated "QuestBits Dev" app (own bundle id, own `TodoAppDev` database, own `todo-dev` MCP registration, orange DEV badge in the sidebar footer) so experiments never touch production data. `FLAVOR=prod` or CI builds the production app.
### Fixed
- Local builds stamped a hardcoded `1.0.0` as their version; they now derive it from `git describe --tags` (e.g. `1.2.1-3-g65a2000`) so the sidebar footer shows the build's real provenance. Release builds still use the git tag.

item.title: QuestBits 1.2.1
item.description:
## [1.2.1] - 2026-07-09
### Fixed
- Auto-update signature verification: the Sparkle public key baked into the app did not match the private key CI signs releases with, so every shipped build silently rejected updates. The correct public key is now baked in. **Note:** builds ≤ 1.2.0 carry the wrong key and cannot auto-update to this release — update them once manually by downloading the DMG.
### Added
- Custom app icon (parchment quest-scroll) bundled into the app and DMG. - App version shown in the sidebar footer.
### Changed
- README: added Gatekeeper instructions for opening un-notarized downloads ("damaged app" fix via `xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine`).

item.title: QuestBits 1.2.0
item.description:
## [1.2.0] - 2026-07-02
### Added
- Cozy RPG theme ("QuestBit"): parchment / bark / harvest-gold palette replacing the previous white-and-blue design; DESIGN.md rewritten as the `QuestBit-cozy-rpg` spec. - Bundled fonts (OFL): Alegreya for headings and the timer, Quicksand for body text — registered from the app bundle at launch. - Bundled icon set: Lucide (ISC) and Tabler (MIT) SVG icons for the sidebar, project rows, and pomodoro phases (campfire / beer / bed / embers); license texts ship inside the app. - Decorative art (all CC0): Kenney fantasy border framing the task-detail pane, ambientCG paper grain on parchment surfaces, and wood planks under the dark hearth bars. - New due-date picker: a formatted-date button opens a calendar popover with Today / Tomorrow / Next week quick picks (replaces the stepper field). - Done tasks collapse into a "Done (N)" toggle section at the bottom of the task list; the expanded/collapsed state persists across launches.
### Changed
- Task-detail pane rebuilt from the system grouped form into themed parchment section cards with bright vellum input fields. - Sidebar restyled as a quest log: "Quests" / "Quest Logs" headers, gold selection cards, and per-project code + task-count pills. - Pomodoro bar and update banner are now dark-bark hearth surfaces with cream text and wood-grain texture.
### Fixed
- Input fields in the task-detail pane rendered a doubled outline (a container shadow cascaded onto every child view).
